item.title: American Contract Systems Inc: Convenience kits containing Medline Namic Angiographic Control Syringes with Rotating Adaptor CORONARY ANGIO PACK Model numbers ANCA80AP ANC Recall
item.product: Convenience kits containing Medline Namic Angiographic Control Syringes with Rotating Adaptor CORONARY ANGIO PACK Model numbers ANCA80AP ANC
item.summary: Impacted kits contain syringes recalled by Medline Industries. Syringe rotating adaptor may unwind during use, which may result in a loose connection or full disconnection between the syringe and manifold. Potential risk for biohazard exposure, blood loss, infection, or air embolism. Product details: Convenience kits containing Medline Namic Angiographic Control Syringes with Rotating Adaptor CORONARY ANGIO PACK Model numbers ANCA80AP ANCA80AQ
item.affectedPeople: US distribution to MN. No OUS distribution.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
